'''鈭歵h-n-g''' ('''thanaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chase|chase]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chase|chase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-n-g
|-
! Lemma
| thanaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thanagithi|thanagithi]] || [[word:thanagiji|thanagiji]] || [[word:thanagishi|thanagishi]] || [[word:thanagi|thanagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thanaguthuth|thanaguthuth]] || [[word:thanagujuj|thanagujuj]] || [[word:thanagushush|thanagushush]] || [[word:thanag|thanag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanaguthu|thanaguthu]] || [[word:thanaguju|thanaguju]] || [[word:thanagushu|thanagushu]] || [[word:thanagu|thanagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanagufuth|thanagufuth]] || [[word:thanagufuj|thanagufuj]] || [[word:thanagufush|thanagufush]] || [[word:thanaguf|thanaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thanagethe|thanagethe]] || [[word:thanageje|thanageje]] || [[word:thanageshe|thanageshe]] || [[word:thanage|thanage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thanagothoth|thanagothoth]] || [[word:thanagojoj|thanagojoj]] || [[word:thanagoshosh|thanagoshosh]] || [[word:thanag|thanag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanagotho|thanagotho]] || [[word:thanagojo|thanagojo]] || [[word:thanagosho|thanagosho]] || [[word:thanago|thanago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanagofoth|thanagofoth]] || [[word:thanagofoj|thanagofoj]] || [[word:thanagofosh|thanagofosh]] || [[word:thanagof|thanagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thanag忙th忙|thanag忙th忙]] || [[word:thanag忙j忙|thanag忙j忙]] || [[word:thanag忙sh忙|thanag忙sh忙]] || [[word:thanag忙|thanag忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thanagathath|thanagathath]] || [[word:thanagajaj|thanagajaj]] || [[word:thanagashash|thanagashash]] || [[word:thanag|thanag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanagatha|thanagatha]] || [[word:thanagaja|thanagaja]] || [[word:thanagasha|thanagasha]] || [[word:thanaga|thanaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanagafath|thanagafath]] || [[word:thanagafaj|thanagafaj]] || [[word:thanagafash|thanagafash]] || [[word:thanagaf|thanagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thanagasha|thanagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothanagasha|gothanagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithanagasha|gokithanagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thanagn眉sha|thanagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothanagnkn眉sha|gothanagnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithanagn眉sha|gokithanagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thanagsh毛sha|thanagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothanagnksh毛sha|gothanagnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithanagsh毛sha|gokithanagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thanagrosha|thanagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothanagnkrosha|gothanagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithanagrosha|gokithanagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thanagmusha|thanagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothanagnkmusha|gothanagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithanagmusha|gokithanagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thanagsherasha|thanagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothanagnksherasha|gothanagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithanagsherasha|gokithanagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thanagngasha|thanagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothanagnkngasha|gothanagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithanagngasha|gokithanagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thanagyasha|thanagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothanagnkyasha|gothanagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithanagyasha|gokithanagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thanagyamasha|thanagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothanagnkyamasha|gothanagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithanagyamasha|gokithanagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thanagn眉sh毛sha|thanagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothanagnkn眉sh毛sha|gothanagnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithanagn眉sh毛sha|gokithanagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thanagn眉rosha|thanagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothanagnkn眉rosha|gothanagnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithanagn眉rosha|gokithanagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thanagn眉musha|thanagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothanagnkn眉musha|gothanagnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithanagn眉musha|gokithanagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thanagsh毛n眉sha|thanagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothanagnksh毛n眉sha|gothanagnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithanagsh毛n眉sha|gokithanagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thanagsh毛rosha|thanagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothanagnksh毛rosha|gothanagnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithanagsh毛rosha|gokithanagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thanagsh毛musha|thanagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothanagnksh毛musha|gothanagnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithanagsh毛musha|gokithanagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thanagron眉sha|thanagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothanagnkron眉sha|gothanagnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithanagron眉sha|gokithanagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thanagrosh毛sha|thanagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothanagnkrosh毛sha|gothanagnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithanagrosh毛sha|gokithanagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thanagromusha|thanagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothanagnkromusha|gothanagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithanagromusha|gokithanagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thanagmun眉sha|thanagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothanagnkmun眉sha|gothanagnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithanagmun眉sha|gokithanagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thanagmush毛sha|thanagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothanagnkmush毛sha|gothanagnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithanagmush毛sha|gokithanagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thanagmurosha|thanagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothanagnkmurosha|gothanagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithanagmurosha|gokithanagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thanag|thanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙n忙g|th忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothanag|hothanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙n忙g|hoth忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothanag|hohothanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙n忙g|hohoth忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thanag|n眉thanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙n忙g|n眉th忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thanag|n眉n眉thanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙n忙g|n眉n眉th忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thanag|n茂thanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙n忙g|n茂th忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thanag|n茂n茂thanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙n忙g|n茂n茂th忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthanag|luthanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙n忙g|luth忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthanag|luluthanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙n忙g|luluth忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithanag|lithanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙n忙g|lith忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithanag|lilithanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙n忙g|lilith忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothanag|kothanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙n忙g|koth忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothanag|kokothanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙n忙g|kokoth忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethanag|kethanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙n忙g|keth忙n忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethanag|kekethanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙n忙g|keketh忙n忙g]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
